mission: We help marketing teams ship copy that actually sounds like their brand, by checking every AI-written draft against the brand's own voice before it goes out.
purpose: Because the flood of AI-generated content is eroding the one thing a brand can't outsource — sounding like itself.
vision: A web where every brand's voice is verifiable, and 'on-brand' is something you can prove, not just feel.

iterations.change_from_previous: first draft — too vague, a competitor could say it

iterations.text: Aligna checks AI copy against your brand voice.
Aligna is the brand-voice QA layer for teams that write with AI.

uvp.final: Aligna is the brand-voice QA layer for teams that write with AI: it scores every draft against your voice and shows you what to fix before you publish.
uvp.final_justification: It names a category nobody else occupies (brand-voice QA), the specific user (teams writing with AI), and the verifiable outcome (a score + fixes), which no generic AI writer can claim.
